description_long: This is a small, rustic brick house with a gable roof, situated on a slightly raised, uneven terrain surrounded by natural elements. The house features a prominent front staircase leading up to a covered porch area, with a circular window and a rectangular window on the brick facade. The property is flanked by two large leafy trees and several wooden utility poles, adding to its rural, slightly overgrown appearance. There is a carport or shed structure adjacent to the house, partially sheltering an old vehicle, and the yard is scattered with outdoor furniture and debris. The roof is shingled, and the house sits on a stone or gravel base, with visible steps and a retaining wall supporting the entryway. The overall scene suggests a lived-in, somewhat neglected residence on the outskirts of an urban area.
description: A rustic brick house with a gable roof, front steps, and a covered porch, surrounded by trees, utility poles, and a carport with an old vehicle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, covered porch, circular window, and the carport with a vehicle under trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, gable roof, and the depth of the carport and utility poles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, dense trees, and the shed structure with more visible foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the carport, trees, and the arrangement of utility poles along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Front steps leading to a covered porch with a simple door, no columns, and a small overhang.
